title: Artificing Mastery
summary: Artificing develops into either efficient workshop throughput or higher-complexity invention. Threshold pacing keeps each unlock tied to visible technical growth.

thresholds.title: Workbench Basics
thresholds.description: Pick the kind of artisan you are becoming.

thresholds.title: Applied Method
thresholds.description: Specialization becomes visible in how you approach crafting.

thresholds.title: Systems Thinking
thresholds.description: Your practice moves from tinkering to designed process.

thresholds.title: Master Blueprints
thresholds.description: Late-game mastery supports advanced invention paths.

nodes.title: Workshop Primer
nodes.description: The primer claims craft becomes engineering when every part is named before it is cut.

nodes.title: Signal Law
nodes.description: Mechanist notes map current and delay so redstone answers as predictably as dawn.

nodes.title: Hand Tune
nodes.description: The tinkerer chapter teaches subtle tool adjustments that save labor over seasons.

nodes.title: Relay Stack
nodes.description: Inner mechanism diagrams show chained signals that drive whole workshops unattended.

nodes.title: Edge Honing
nodes.description: The tinkerer script details balancing tools for cleaner cuts and longer service.

nodes.title: Hybrid Schema
nodes.description: This central schema binds automation and handcraft into a single workshop doctrine.

nodes.title: Clock Chamber
nodes.description: Inner mechanism leaves detail timed engines that keep systems breathing day and night.

nodes.title: Factory Web
nodes.description: Outer diagrams describe linked contraptions that route goods with near-human judgment.

nodes.title: Master Balance
nodes.description: Inner tinkerer pages refine weight and leverage until tools feel like extensions of bone.

nodes.title: Far Reach Rig
nodes.description: Outer plans show articulated handles and heads for work where footing is perilous.

nodes.title: Hidden Engine
nodes.description: Ciphered notes describe an engine room that turns itself while the master sleeps.

nodes.title: Secret Instrument
nodes.description: A hidden sketchbook promises a tool line that outworks any common forge by itself.
